productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Grey Track Pants
description: CompositionGrey track pants made of 100% cotton, has a broad elasticated waistband with a drawstring, two insert pockets on the sides, one patch pocket at the back with numbers in rubber print and black piping on the sidesFitRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not tumble dry, wring, scrub, bleach or dry cleanDry flat in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsTrain better in these grey track pants from united colors of benetton. The soft and broad elasticated waistband sits snug around your waist, while the drawstring allows you to further customise the fit. This cotton tracks stretches and moves with your body to give you a comfortable feel. Team it with Sports t-shirts and fitness shoes for a great workout session.Model StatisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18&rdquo
